overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey depicting nighttime exploration of the Temple of Asklepios sanctuary. The character walks along dirt paths and stone walkways, enters a torchlit temple, and emerges onto a panoramic overlook of the ancient Greek city below under a full moon.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the temple complex at night

notable_agents.action: temple guard carrying a lit torch walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large stone temple with columns and triangular pediment lit by warm interior lights
tall dark cypress trees flanking the temple entrance
steep rocky cliff wall lining the left side of the path
unpaved dirt path with patches of grass
scattered olive trees with gnarled trunks

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt trail toward the Temple of Asklepios at night. The path is flanked by rocky cliffs and scattered olive trees, while a guard with a torch approaches from the direction of the temple.

events.description: location identifier changes from Abandoned Sanctuary to Temple of Asklepios as the camera turns toward the main entrance

agents.ego_description: turning right to face the temple entrance and approaching the stone steps

entered.detail: grand entrance with tall columns and steps leading up to wooden doors
large stone bowl with bright flames flanking the entrance steps
cut stone tiles replacing the dirt path

segments.scene_description: Turning toward the temple entrance as the location name updates on screen. The camera approaches the stone portico with burning braziers flanking the steps, transitioning from dirt path to paved stone plaza.

events.description: entering the covered temple interior through large wooden lattice doors
exiting the temple to an open overlook with panoramic views of the city below

agents.ego_description: walking through the torchlit temple interior and emerging onto the stone overlook platform

entered.detail: covered corridor with high ceiling and ornate architectural details
large wooden doors with geometric lattice patterns
stone altar visible through the exit doors
distant view of the ancient city becoming visible through the exit
elevated stone terrace with patterned paving

segments.scene_description: Passing through the temple's interior corridor with ornate columns and lattice doors, illuminated by wall-mounted torches, then emerging onto a stone overlook that reveals a sweeping vista of the ancient city illuminated by moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple overlook with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: standing at the overlook panning slowly across the moonlit cityscape and distant mountains

entered.detail: bright full moon partially obscured by clouds
scattered clouds illuminated by moonlight
mountain silhouettes on the horizon
large ceramic urns with plants atop stone pedestals

segments.scene_description: At the stone overlook, the camera pans across the vast ancient city below, with the full moon breaking through clouds and illuminating the distant mountains and urban landscape stretching to the horizon.

events.description: turning away from the overlook and continuing along the elevated cliffside path

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow cliffside path past decorative statues and temple structures

notable_agents.action: group of sanctuary figures walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: stone structures built into the cliffside with lit windows
tall pillar topped with a decorative lion sculpture
narrow paved walkway along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Leaving the overlook to walk along a narrow cliffside path. The route passes a decorative pillar topped with a lion statue and offers side views of the temple complex, with other figures visible walking ahead on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged nighttime trail into the heart of a sanctuary, eventually opening onto a vast lunar vista. It begins by following a dirt path flanked by rocky cliffs and olive trees, moving toward a guard with a torch before transitioning onto a paved stone plaza at the temple entrance. As the camera passes through a torchlit interior corridor of ornate columns and lattice doors, the enclosed space suddenly expands into a sweeping stone overlook. The scene then pans across a sprawling ancient city illuminated by a full moon breaking through the clouds, revealing distant mountains on the horizon. Finally, the camera turns away from the vista to follow a narrow cliffside path, passing a lion statue pillar and other figures as it winds along the edge of the temple complex.
